contexts.context: ...and find out where he would be by the <mark>afternoon</mark>. The following conversation ensued:     "May I ask...
...now at Fridau.  I dropped in one early <mark>afternoon</mark> on my way to Vienna, just to leave...
...Chester would like me to come over in the <mark>afternoon</mark> - by now it was Sunday.      The room...
...both entranced, struck sparks off one another all <mark>afternoon</mark>, Kallman was silent.  Kallman lacked Auden...
...shall smoke your cigarettes for the rest of the <mark>afternoon</mark>."  I very much doubt whether I did.  On...
...yesterday just before lunch. Tried twice in the <mark>afternoon</mark> and once this morning to reach you , but...
...find your bearing boorish, by four in the <mark>afternoon</mark> frequently close the curtains to shut your shabbiness out....
...We shall look forward to seeing you on Saturday <mark>afternoon</mark>. We have a gramophone now and a tape...
